name: Ramia, Bed breaking Aftercare.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Some Morning Aftercare from Mommy Ramia after she (almost) broke your pelvis last night. Maybe she'll cook you breakfast, or maybe there's going to be a round 2. Who knows.

I see this character a lot, but I wanted to do something different than the coom bot Ramia bots. Obviously it can go straight to sex if you want it to, but you also have the choice of it being some wholesome aftercare.

Making this bot actually got me started on reading this series. I've been meaning to for a while. I tried to capture her character as best I could. If you guys have any tweaks you could share to get it better, that'd be nice.

Also playing around with the Example Dialogues. Not sure how it'll affect the messages.

(Art and Character by TheGoldenSmurf.)
creator: wisperrr
